description: Four-turn chat matrix for POST …/ai/stream (form + preview). Copy to chat-scenarios.json and set agentId + paths for your site. See chat-scenarios.schema-hint.txt.

turns.summary: Warm-up: no tools, checks stream + latency baseline.
turns.prompt: Say hello in one short sentence.

turns.summary: Form assistant: asks model to propose a field change (client JSON apply path).
turns.prompt: Update the page title field (title_t) to the exact string: Chat harness QA title. Reply with what you changed or the JSON snippet you would apply.

turns.summary: Preview surface: translation tools need repo path + preview token in real Studio.
turns.prompt: Translate the main textual content of this page to French. Use translation batch tools if they are available; if not, list which fields you would translate.

turns.summary: Image tool path: requires agent/site policy that enables GenerateImage + keys on the server.
turns.prompt: Generate a simple 256x256 abstract placeholder image for automated testing and describe where you would save it in the repo.
